queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(CASE WHEN load_factor > 50.0 THEN 1 END) AS high_load_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN load_factor <= 50.0 THEN 1 END) AS low_load_cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

expected.note: Histogram with conditional COUNT using CASE

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS bucket_time, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS zone_events, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY bucket_time, facility_zone ORDER BY bucket_time ASC, facility_zone ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '30 seconds') AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(item_count) AS items, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge FROM "{stream}" WHERE operation_mode != 'manual' GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS time_window, operation_mode, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor > 50.0) AS high_load_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor <= 50.0) AS low_load_count, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY time_window, operation_mode ORDER BY time_window ASC, operation_mode ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '5 minutes') AS block, sorter_model, COUNT(*) AS samples, ROUND(MIN(throughput_rate), 2) AS floor_tput, ROUND(MAX(throughput_rate), 2) AS ceiling_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY block, sorter_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY block ASC, ceiling_tput DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS time_slot, control_center, COUNT(*) AS events, ROUND(SUM(package_size) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS avg_pkg FROM "{stream}" WHERE package_size >= 250 GROUP BY time_slot, control_center ORDER BY time_slot ASC, events DESC

expected.note: Auto-interval histogram + control_center breakdown with package filter

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS minute_slot, COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(DISTINCT pallet_id) AS distinct_pallets, COUNT(DISTINCT conveyor_lane) AS distinct_lanes FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY minute_slot ORDER BY minute_slot ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '3 minutes') AS interval_bucket, conveyor_lane, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(scan_attempts), 2) AS avg_scan FROM "{stream}" WHERE scan_attempts >= 1 GROUP BY interval_bucket, conveyor_lane, operation_mode ORDER BY interval_bucket ASC, cnt DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '4 minutes') AS window_block, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining >= 60.0) AS charged_ops, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0) AS low_charge_ops, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0), 2) AS low_charge_avg_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY window_block ORDER BY window_block ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '15 seconds') AS fine_bucket, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(defect_limit), 3) AS avg_defect, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate), 2) AS tput_volatility FROM "{stream}" WHERE defect_limit IS NOT NULL AND throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fine_bucket HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY fine_bucket ASC

SELECT (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)) AS time_bucket,   page_slug,   COALESCE(graphql_operation, 'N/A') AS graphql_operation,   COALESCE(info_tag, 'N/A') AS info_tag,   COALESCE(visitor_session_id, 'N/A') AS visitor_session_id,   COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "{stream}" WHERE (graphql_operation = 'verifyPayment')   AND (passthrough_flag <> 'true')   AND (info_tag IS NULL OR info_tag NOT LIKE '%NonexistentPattern%') GROUP BY page_slug, graphql_operation, info_tag, (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)), visitor_session_id HAVING (COUNT(*) > 0) ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' THEN 'iOS' ELSE 'Other' END) AS platform, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' GROUP BY _time, platform ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code NOT IN ('E001', 'E003') THEN 1 END) AS clean_metrics, COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) AS error_pct FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation') GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt, os_platform AS breakdown FROM "{stream}" WHERE page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'searchPage') AND action_category IN ('navigation') AND os_platform IN ('Mac OS X (iPhone)', 'Android 14') AND org_name IN ('warehouse-south') GROUP BY _time, breakdown ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version IS NOT NULL AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer', 'Tablet') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage') AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation') GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IN ('warehouse-north', 'warehouse-south', 'warehouse-central') AND build_version NOT IN ('v1.0.0', 'v1.1.2') AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer') AND page_slug = 'itemPage' AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation', 'interaction') GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, exception_message, COUNT(*) AS error_count FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IN ('warehouse-east', 'warehouse-west') AND re_match(os_platform, 'Android|iPhone') AND action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND (exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' OR upstream_error_code LIKE '%UP-E%') GROUP BY _time, exception_message ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' THEN 'iOS' ELSE os_platform END) AS platform, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code NOT IN ('E002', 'E004') AND exception_message NOT LIKE '%Timeout%' THEN 1 END) AS filtered_count FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' GROUP BY _time, platform ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, MAX(latency_ms) AS max_latency, COUNT(CASE WHEN latency_ms > 500 THEN 1 END) AS slow_count, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' THEN 1 END) AS performance_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'navigation' THEN 1 END) AS navigation_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'interaction' THEN 1 END) AS interaction_count FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt, coalesce(page_url, page_slug) AS page FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' AND org_name = 'warehouse-south' GROUP BY _time, page ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, (CASE WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 20 THEN substring(exception_message, 1, 20) || '...' ELSE exception_message END) AS short_error, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message IS NOT NULL GROUP BY _time, short_error ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, approx_percentile_cont(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT), 0.95) AS p95_latency, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 AND page_slug LIKE '%Page%' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, device_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' AND page_slug = 'itemPage' AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer', 'Tablet') GROUP BY _time, device_type ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IN ('warehouse-north', 'warehouse-south', 'warehouse-central') AND build_version NOT IN ('v1.0.0', 'v1.2.0') AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'searchPage', 'checkoutPage') AND action_category NOT IN ('interaction', 'navigation') GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, error_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL AND error_code IN ('E001', 'E003', 'E005', 'E002', 'E004') GROUP BY _time, error_code ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version IS NOT NULL AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer', 'Tablet') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage') AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation') AND error_code NOT IN ('E002', 'E004') AND visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_latency FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY _time, component_name ORDER BY _time ASC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '5 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' THEN 'iOS' ELSE os_platform END) AS platform, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage', 'searchPage') GROUP BY _time, platform, page_slug ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' OR upstream_error_code LIKE '%UP-E%' OR error_code LIKE '%E00%' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, response_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND response_code > 0 GROUP BY _time, response_code ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, tag_a, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' AND tag_a IN ('prod', 'staging') GROUP BY _time, tag_a ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minutes') AS _time, (CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'slow' END) AS speed, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY _time, speed ORDER BY _time ASC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, org_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY _time, org_name ORDER BY _time ASC, org_name ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minutes') AS _time, device_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' GROUP BY _time, device_type ORDER BY _time ASC, device_type ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, (CASE WHEN response_code < 400 THEN 'success' ELSE 'error' END) AS outcome, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' GROUP BY _time, outcome ORDER BY _time ASC, outcome ASC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '5 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'interaction' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minutes') AS _time, action_subcategory, ROUND(AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)), 1) AS avg_lat, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 AND action_subcategory IS NOT NULL GROUP BY _time, action_subcategory ORDER BY _time ASC, cnt DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, page_slug, MIN(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS min_lat, MAX(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS max_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 AND page_slug IS NOT NULL GROUP BY _time, page_slug ORDER BY _time ASC, min_lat ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minutes') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN error_code IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS errors FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS _time, guard_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT component_name) AS components FROM "{stream}" WHERE guard_mode IS NOT NULL GROUP BY _time, guard_mode ORDER BY _time ASC, guard_mode ASC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '30 second') AS _time, component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time, component_name ORDER BY _time ASC, cnt DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, COALESCE(scan_category, 'unknown') AS scan_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_latency FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time, scan_type ORDER BY _time ASC, cnt DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE response_code >= 400) AS error_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE response_code < 400) AS success_count, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT) > 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS slow_count, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT) <= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fast_count FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, CASE WHEN auth_result = 'pass' THEN 'authenticated' WHEN auth_result = 'fail' THEN 'failed' ELSE 'other' END AS auth_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time, auth_class ORDER BY _time ASC, cnt DESC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, COALESCE(info_tag, bot_flag) AS tag_info, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time, tag_info ORDER BY _time ASC, cnt DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '30 second') AS _time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re_match(log, 'ACK')) AS ack_logs, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re_match(log, 'error')) AS error_logs, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, CASE WHEN re_match(facility_zone, 'ZONE-[1-2]') THEN 'front' ELSE 'back' END AS zone_group, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 1) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time, zone_group ORDER BY _time, zone_group
SELECT _timestamp - (_timestamp % 30000000) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re_match(exception_message, 'Exception')) AS exceptions FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minute') AS _time, COALESCE(bot_flag, 'unknown') AS is_bot, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(COALESCE(action_subcategory, ''), 'vitals|metric|interaction') GROUP BY _time, is_bot ORDER BY _time, is_bot

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '15 second') AS _time, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 1) AS avg_tput, ROUND(MAX(throughput_rate), 1) AS max_tput, ROUND(MIN(throughput_rate), 1) AS min_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(facility_zone, 'ZONE-[1-4]') GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time
